manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

sacrifice

Related words are:

- loss
- victim
- offering

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

content.thinking:
I need to describe "sacrifice" without using:
- sacrifice (or variants like sacrificing, sacrificed)
- loss
- victim
- offering

Key concepts related to sacrifice:
- Giving up something valuable for a greater purpose
- Religious rituals
- Selflessness
- Trading something now for later benefit
- Martyrdom (but victim is banned)
- Altruism

Let me think of a concise clue:
- "Giving up something important for a greater good"
- "Voluntarily surrendering something valuable for a cause or purpose"
- "When you give up something precious to gain or help something else"
- "Ritual of giving something valuable to a deity"

I need to be short and direct. Let me go with:

"Giving up something valuable for a higher purpose or greater good"

Wait, let me make it shorter since I'm under time pressure:

"Giving up something valuable for a greater good or purpose"

Or even shorter:
"Voluntarily giving up something precious for a higher cause"

content.text: CLUE: Giving up something valuable or important for a greater purpose or cause

clem_player.response: CLUE: Giving up something valuable or important for a greater purpose or cause

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: Giving up something valuable or important for a greater purpose or cause

content.thinking:
The clue is "Giving up something valuable or important for a greater purpose or cause"

This strongly suggests the word "sacrifice" - which means giving up something valued for the sake of something else regarded as more important or worthy.

Let me think if there are other possibilities:
- "sacrifice" - most direct match
- "offering" - could work but less common
- "donation" - giving something away but not necessarily for a greater purpose
- "surrender" - giving up but not necessarily for a purpose
- "forfeit" - giving up something as a penalty

"Sacrifice" seems like the most fitting word for this clue.
